---
title: "Session Title"
subtitle: "Short descriptive subtitle"
---

## Session Arc

::: {.grid-3}
::: {.card}
### Concept
Add the first big idea.
:::

::: {.card}
### Method
Add the main computational tool.
:::

::: {.card}
### Outcome
Add the student-facing payoff.
:::
:::

## Core Mathematics

$$
\dot x = f(x, y; \theta)
$$

- Define the state variables.
- Define the key parameters.
- State what students should observe.

## Computational Workflow

::: {.workflow-grid}
::: {.tool-card}
### Setup
List the main libraries or data structures.
:::

::: {.tool-card}
### Simulation
Describe the numerical or algorithmic loop.
:::

::: {.tool-card}
### Visualization
Describe the plots, animations, or interaction.
:::

::: {.tool-card}
### Experiment
State what students should vary.
:::
:::

## Case Study

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
### Model or dataset
- Add the most important interpretation.
- Add the most important equation or update rule.
:::

::: {.column width="42%"}
![Replace with an existing figure if available.](../img/ie_logo.png)
:::
:::

## Full Module Pages

::: {.module-links}
[Overview](../modules/topic/index.qmd)
[Case study](../modules/topic/case-study.qmd)
[Assignment](../modules/topic/assignment.qmd)
:::
